item.name: Yanxian Sturgeon
item.description:
A large freshwater fish whose eggs are considered so delicious, it gave rise to the saying “hoes before roe”─a reminder that work precedes pleasure.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: Existing since prehistoric times, this fish possesses peculiar butterfly-shaped patterns upon its shark-like body─traits that have earned it the appellation “butterfly shark” in the Far East. Its flavorsome roe is enjoyed as a rare delicacy.
